content.en:
Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue then began to go back, and began to retreat and refine the natal talent fruit as soon as possible.

For Dao-level natal talents, they are still quite looking forward to it.

Not long after, Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue successively gave birth to a Dao-level natal talent.

【Dao-level Natal Talent: Star Armor】

"It turned out to be a defensive Star Dao Technique!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised, but he was a little disappointed in the surprise, his most ideal Dao technique was a star-type attack Dao technique.

Of course, this Dao technique is also very good.

In the future, it will be very easy for him to cultivate defensive Dao techniques, and he will also cultivate star-type Dao techniques much faster than before, but the most suitable for him is the star-type defensive Dao technique.

The other side.

The Dao-level natal talent born by Ye Xingyue is the Star Gate, which is a Dao-level natal talent that contains the Avenue of Stars and the Avenue of Space, and it can be regarded as suitable for her, with both defense and shuttling ability.

The only pity is that this is not an attacking Dao-level natal talent.

Ye Tian was the first to know about the Dao-level natal talents of the two children, and immediately used the copying talent to copy these two Dao-level natal talents and turned them into his own Dao-level natal talents.

Immediately, Ye Tian and Xiao Yue also began to take the Natal Talent Fruit.

Xiao Yue took the Natal Talent Fruit, and she also gave birth to a Dao-level Natal Talent: Moonlight Wings, which is a Dao-level Natal Talent that increases speed, and it will be much easier for her to cultivate the Dao Technique of Speed in the future.

And Ye Tian also began to take the initiative to give birth to the first Dao-level natal talent that belonged to him.

【Dao Rank Natal Talent: Emperor Armor】

This is a Dao-level natal talent that has both defense and increased combat power, and it is a perfect fit for Ye Tian's Great Wilderness Law Body, which is a very good Dao-level natal talent.

Immediately, Ye Tian fused the Emperor Armor with other fused defensive Dao-level natal talents, and still named them Emperor Armor, forming a new and powerful Emperor-Armor Dao-level natal talent.

"Something is going to happen next, this time there are so many Dao-level natal talents, many True Ancestors are afraid that they can't wait to take the Refining Natal Talent Fruit, so there should be a lot of Dao-level natal talents!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he asked the people of the Nine Extremes Legion to start investigating the news of the Dao-level natal talent, believing that it would not be long before a batch of lists would be delivered to him.

The more Dao-level natal talents in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm were, the happier he became, because the more Dao-level natal talents he could assist.

Therefore, this time when the natal talent tree was born, he was the happiest person.

Next, the people of the Nine Extremes Legion went out to continuously investigate the matter of Dao-level natal talents, but it would definitely take a long time, after all, those Dao-level natal talents would definitely not be exposed at the beginning.

But with the passage of time, there will be rumors within many big forces who have refined the natal talent fruit and given birth to a Dao-level natal talent.

Time passes year by year, and in the blink of an eye, thousands of years have passed.

......

"368 Dao-level natal talents!"

Ye Tian looked at the list in his hand and muttered.

The actual number is definitely more than that, but it is already very good to be able to find out so many at present, if you encounter those Dao-level natal talents in the future, then copy their Dao-level natal talents.

"If I copy and fuse these 368 Dao-level natal talents, I'm afraid my Dao-level natal talents will be greatly enhanced, and it will be easier to cultivate Dao skills!"

Ye Tian said happily.

In the next few decades, Ye Tian traveled all over the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, looking for those Dao-level natal talents, copied their Dao-level natal talents one by one, and finally copied all the talents of the 368 Dao-level natal talents, and also sent a few more Dao-level natal talents.

Such a harvest made Ye Tian excited.

Next, Ye Tian chose another Thousand Dao Technique-King Kong Battle Body!

This is the famous Thousand Dao Technique from King Kong City, but other forces have also included it, and Black Wind Mountain has collected this Thousand Thousand Dao Technique.

This Thousand Dao Technique is very famous, Dao Ancestors have all practiced this Thousand Dao Technique, it is different from the Great Wilderness Law Body, it is a passive Thousand Dao Technique, and the Great Wilderness Law Body is an active type of Thousand Dao Technique.

In fact, most of the Dao techniques are active.

What is a passive defense technique? That is, it does not need to be urged, and once it is attacked, it will automatically defend.

Therefore, the passive defense technique of the Vajra Battle Body is relatively good.

Ye Tian's other Dao techniques had basically been cultivated to the limit level, so there were no Dao techniques to cultivate at the moment, so he naturally wanted to find a new Dao technique to cultivate, so he picked the Vajra Battle Body.

Sure enough.

After Ye Tian's Dao-level natal talent became much stronger, his cultivation speed skyrocketed.

In a short period of time, the Vajra Battle Body successfully got started, and then Xiaocheng and Dacheng, I don't know how many times faster than when I was cultivating before.

In less than 100,000 years, Ye Tian had successfully cultivated the Vajra Battle Body to the consummation realm.

As for the extreme level, it will take a little more time.

In the subsequent retreat, Ye Tian's main task was to comprehend the forbidden path, followed by the cultivation of forbidden techniques, and as for the Taoist techniques, he put them down first.

After all, the Zhongqian Dao Technique is not very helpful to him at present, unless it is the Great Thousand Dao Technique.

However, the True Ancestor level had no way to cultivate the Great Thousand Dao Technique at all, and even if he cultivated for hundreds of millions of years, he would not be able to cultivate it.

The Great Thousand Dao Technique needs to be cultivated after the Dao, and every move is the power of the Dao, and the Great Thousand Dao Technique is actually a high-level use of the power of the Dao Ancestor, which is extremely powerful.

And the True Ancestor does not have the power of the Dao Ancestor, even if it is the Supreme True Ancestor, he does not have the power of the Dao Ancestor.

Therefore, Ye Tian currently did not meet the conditions for cultivating the Great Thousand Dao Technique.

Otherwise, if he practices any of the Great Thousand Dao Techniques, his strength will be able to skyrocket!

---------------

On the edge of the Dark Forbidden Realm, there is a small world, as if it is a world of its own.

This is where the Forbidden Temple is located.

Here, the hall master of the Forbidden Hall used an initial realm to open up a world, which housed the people of the Forbidden Hall to cultivate, and even used a large array to absorb the dark forbidden power of the outside world to forcibly temper their bodies.

At this time, the hall master of the Forbidden Hall was in retreat.

His aura grew stronger, as if he was about to break a boundary.

Abrupt.

Boom!

The aura of the hall master of the forbidden hall instantly broke the shackles and was promoted to the realm of the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

"Finally a breakthrough!"

The hall master of the Forbidden Hall said excitedly.

How many long years have passed, he has been trapped in the extreme of the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and he has not been able to break through due to the problem of foundation.

Now, he has finally made up for part of his foundation and stepped into the realm of the Fivefold Dao Ancestor.

"The Mitian True Sutra of the Mitian Sect is really good, even if I am the Fourfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, cultivating this secret technique can also make up for the foundation, and even reshape the origin. It's a pity that once I cultivate the Mitian True Sutra, it is equivalent to firmly combining with the Mitian Sect, and there is no way to break away from the Mitian Sect. "

The main road of the Forbidden Temple.

The Mitian True Sutra is divided into the Mitian Bible and the Mitian Dao Sutra, and he cultivates the Mitian Sutra, and will be restrained by the Mitian Dao Sutra, once he encounters the Taoist Ancestor who cultivates the Mitian Dao Sutra, he may not be able to exert fifty percent of his strength, and he is also fully restrained in other aspects.

It is precisely because of the existence of the Mitian Bible that many Dao ancestors cannot betray after taking refuge in the Mitian Sect.

He also knew about this problem, but he was also moved by the Heavenly Bible, which was also the reason why many Dao Ancestors knew that there would be this sequelae, but they couldn't help cultivating.

But if he cultivates to the invincible Dao Ancestor realm in the future, he will not be affected by the Heavenly Dao Sutra.

It also gives him hope!

After all, he has mastered the power of the dark taboo, as long as he makes up for the foundation, he will still have a great chance to step into the Supreme Dao Ancestor in the future, and naturally there is a glimmer of hope to enter the realm of the Invincible Dao Ancestor.

"Now, my strength has stepped into the Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and with the help of the forbidden strange things that have been scraped up from below, the forbidden body has also been raised to the realm of Xiaocheng! Hmph, Daoshan Dao Ancestor, this time you are dead!"

The hall master of the Forbidden Hall said coldly.

Although Daoshan Dao Ancestor is also a five-heaven strength, it is far inferior to him.

With Xiao Cheng's forbidden body and the power of dark taboos, he can easily defeat Daoshan Daozu.

This time, unless Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor can break through to the Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor realm.

However, where is the Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor so easy to break through!

If it was so easy to break through, those Nine Heavens forces would not have so many Dao Ancestors who were still in the realm of three or four heavens, five or six heavens.

He was ninety percent sure that Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor was still in the realm of the Five Heavenly Dao Ancestors.

Therefore, he must kill Daoshan Daozu as soon as possible, and not give Daoshan Daozu any hope of breaking through.

"The Forbidden Hall Dao Ancestor listened to the order and followed this seat to Dao Mountain, this time this seat will break through Dao Mountain!"

The Forbidden Hall Master commanded.

"Yes!"

One Dao Ancestor after another appeared, and a dense aura surrounded and filled this world.

If someone came here, they would definitely find that the Dao Ancestors of the Forbidden Hall had reached more than a hundred.
